Defines a stub function to indicate Bluetooth Classic support as false.

# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides a narrow functionality. It defines a single function, [`bt_driver_supports_bt_classic`](<#bt_driver_supports_bt_classic>), which returns a boolean value. The function indicates whether the Bluetooth driver supports Bluetooth Classic, and it always returns `false`. This suggests that the current implementation does not support Bluetooth Classic functionality. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the header file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
